topic: India's economic ties with Azerbaijan improve despite political drift

audio_script.text: India’s cash is flowing to Azerbaijan like never before!
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

audio_script.text: In 2025, India's investments in Azerbaijan shot up by a whopping 29.8% to hit $56.047 million!
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

audio_script.text: This surge shows the growing economic partnership between the two countries, despite stagnant political ties.
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

audio_script.text: And get this - total Indian investments in Azerbaijan have rocketed from $480 million in 2016 to $1.26 billion in 2025!
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

visual_script.prompt: Bar chart showing increase from 2016 to 2025

segments.text: India’s cash is flowing to Azerbaijan like never before!
In 2025, India's investments in Azerbaijan shot up by a whopping 29.8% to hit $56.047 million!
This surge shows the growing economic partnership between the two countries, despite stagnant political ties.
And get this - total Indian investments in Azerbaijan have rocketed from $480 million in 2016 to $1.26 billion in 2025!
segments.visual_description: Bar chart showing increase from 2016 to 2025
